ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "serial_no" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "work_years" INTEGER /* Number of years the individual has worked */,
  "military_service" INTEGER /* Military service status of the individual */,
  "total_income" INTEGER /* Total income of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "race" TEXT /* Racial background of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "citizenship" TEXT /* Citizenship status of the individual */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the individual */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the individual */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("serial_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_history" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work history entry */,
  "serial_no" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company where the individual worked */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the individual at the company */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the employment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the employment */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the individual */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary earned at the job */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the job */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_history_serial_no FOREIGN KEY ("serial_no") REFERENCES individuals ("serial_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "military_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each military service record */,
  "serial_no" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "service_branch" TEXT /* Branch of the military the individual served in */,
  "enlistment_date" TEXT /* Date the individual enlisted */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date the individual was discharged */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank achieved during service */,
  "branch_of_service" TEXT /* Specific branch of the military */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards or honors received during service */,
  "reason_for_discharge" TEXT /* Reason for discharge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_military_records_serial_no FOREIGN KEY ("serial_no") REFERENCES individuals ("serial_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_sources" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income source */,
  "serial_no" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of income source */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of income from the source */,
  "income_year" INTEGER /* Year the income was received */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the income source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of income */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_sources_serial_no FOREIGN KEY ("serial_no") REFERENCES individuals ("serial_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "edu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education history entry */,
  "serial_no" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational institution */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year of graduation */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade point average */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor field of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_serial_no FOREIGN KEY ("serial_no") REFERENCES individuals ("serial_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "serial_no" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Health condition diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment received */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital where the condition was diagnosed */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Name of the doctor who diagnosed the condition */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_serial_no FOREIGN KEY ("serial_no") REFERENCES individuals ("serial_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_members" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family member */,
  "serial_no" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the family member */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the individual */,
  "member_age" INTEGER /* Age of the family member */,
  "member_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the family member */,
  "member_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the family member */,
  "member_education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the family member */,
  "member_income" INTEGER /* Income of the family member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_members_serial_no FOREIGN KEY ("serial_no") REFERENCES individuals ("serial_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "residences" (
  "residence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each residence */,
  "serial_no" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address */,
  "move_in_date" TEXT /* Date the individual moved in */,
  "move_out_date" TEXT /* Date the individual moved out */,
  "residence_type" TEXT /* Type of residence */,
  "rent_or_own" TEXT /* Whether the residence is rented or owned */,
  "residence_size" TEXT /* Size of the residence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("residence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residences_serial_no FOREIGN KEY ("serial_no") REFERENCES individuals ("serial_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "serial_no" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle */,
  "vehicle_usage" TEXT /* Primary use of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_serial_no FOREIGN KEY ("serial_no") REFERENCES individuals ("serial_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "serial_no" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access was granted */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_serial_no FOREIGN KEY ("serial_no") REFERENCES individuals ("serial_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "serial_no" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete, insert) */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_audit_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_audit_serial_no FOREIGN KEY ("serial_no") REFERENCES individuals ("serial_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality issue */,
  "serial_no" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality issue */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was reported */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of data quality issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Any notes related to the resolution of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_serial_no FOREIGN KEY ("serial_no") REFERENCES individuals ("serial_no")
)
